content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.airllm_swarm
FILE: cosmos/core/airllm_swarm.py (447 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: AirLLM Side Swarm - Background Processing During Idle Time

Uses AirLLM to run large models (70B-405B) for:
- Code review and analysis
- Document summarization
- Deep research tasks
- Background reasoning

Runs during idle periods to avoid interfering with main swarm.

CLASSES:
- AirLLMSideSwarm: Background swarm using AirLLM for heavy processing during idle time.

Features:

  Methods: async def load_model(self)
  Methods: def record_main_activity(self)
  Methods: def is_idle(self) -> bool
  Methods: def queue_task(self, task_type: str, prompt: str, priority: int=5, metadata: Optional[dict]=None) ->
  Methods: def get_result(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[dict]
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_airllm_swarm() -> Optional[AirLLMSideSwarm]
- async def initialize_airllm_swarm(model_name: str='meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct', idle_threshold: float=30.0) -> Ai
- async def queue_background_task(task_type: str, prompt: str, priority: int=5) -> Optional[str]
